Comment.value: Called from a button in Package Settings - Delivery - only for Funkis Cloud
This script triggers the TaskServer to copy all files from preview to delivery and does NOT export any files from FAT
Can also be called from script Deliver All Remote CL

Calculation.Text: "When pressing the OK button, Funkis Authoring Tool will transfer the current preview version to the publish server.¶¶This might take a few minutes ."
"Delivery publish server not available in environment"
"This title's delivery server is not configured in this environment. These settings are available in Title settings under the tab Main."

Comment.value: Call from the Code package overview

Calculation.Text: Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Title::Base project ); "" ; FAT Package::Package type id)

Comment.value: URL to the server where we will upload content and code - i.e test.quiddity.se.

Calculation.Text: FAT Title::Reference title & " • " & FAT Package::Reference name
"Please type an email address where the download link should be sent to."

Comment.value: JSONSetElement ( "{}"; ["resultTransferTarget"; $resultTransferTarget; JSONString]; ["originalTitle"; $title_header; JSONString]; ["remoteFolderPath"; $package_dir; JSONString]; ["delivery_milestone"; $delivery_milestone; JSONString]; ["version"; $publishType ; JSONString]; ["emailToNotifyWhenDone"; $emailToNotifyWhenDone ; JSONString]; ["s3BucketName"; $s3bucketName ; JSONString]; ["s3BucketNameDestination"; $s3bucketNameDestination ; JSONString]; ["awsCdnKey"; $awsCdnKey ; JSONString]; ["awsCdnKeyDestination"; $awsCdnKeyDestination ; JSONString]; ["urlDestination"; $urlDestination ; JSONString]; ["awsEnvironment"; $awsEnvironment ; JSONString]; ["apiEndpoint"; $apiEndpoint ; JSONString] )

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "jobTypes" ; FAT Package::Delivery format ) & SetProperty ( "deliveryMilestone" ; Funkis WOW Delivery::Milestone name ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "codebase_id" ; $codebase_id ) & SetProperty ( "codebase_version_id" ; $codebase_version_id ) & SetProperty ( "delivery_milestone" ; $delivery_milestone ) & SetProperty ( "destination" ; $s3bucketNameDestination )

SetProperty ( "jobTypes" ; FAT Package::Delivery format ) & SetProperty ( "deliveryMilestone" ; Funkis WOW Delivery::Milestone name ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $package_id ) & SetProperty ( "codebase_id" ; $codebase_id ) & SetProperty ( "codebase_version_id" ; $codebase_version_id ) & SetProperty ( "delivery_milestone" ; $delivery_milestone ) & SetProperty ( "destination" ; $s3bucketNameDestination )

Comment.value: Development export - uncomment for fault trace

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketNameDestination" ; $s3bucketNameDestination ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKeyDestination" ; $awsCdnKeyDestination ) & SetProperty ( "urlDestination" ; $urlDestination ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "emailToNotifyWhenDone" ; $emailToNotifyWhenDone )& SetProperty ( "title_header" ; $title_header ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir )& SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget )& SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask ) & SetProperty ( "build_id" ; $build_id ) & SetProperty ( "jobTypes" ; $jobTypes ) & SetProperty ( "delivery_milestone" ; $delivery_milestone )

Comment.value: Developer can publish new versions and create packages

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "s3bucketName" ; $s3bucketName ) & SetProperty ( "s3bucketNameDestination" ; $s3bucketNameDestination ) & SetProperty ( "awsEnvironment" ; $awsEnvironment ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKey" ; $awsCdnKey ) & SetProperty ( "awsCdnKeyDestination" ; $awsCdnKeyDestination ) & SetProperty ( "urlDestination" ; $urlDestination ) & SetProperty ( "apiEndpoint" ; $apiEndpoint ) & SetProperty ( "build_id" ; $build_id ) & SetProperty ( "emailToNotifyWhenDone" ; $emailToNotifyWhenDone )& SetProperty ( "title_header" ; $title_header ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; $package_dir )& SetProperty ( "resultTransferTarget" ; $resultTransferTarget )& SetProperty ( "typeOfTask" ; $typeOfTask ) & SetProperty ( "jobTypes" ; $jobTypes ) & SetProperty ( "delivery_milestone" ; $delivery_milestone )

Comment.value: Set timestamp when last export was made
